summary.description: One- to three-sentence overall assessment of the change. State what the PR does and whether it appears safe to merge.

findings.description: Inline review comments. Empty array if there is nothing to flag.

path.description: Repository-relative path of the file the finding applies to.

line_start.description: 1-based line number in the new file content.

line_end.description: 1-based inclusive end line; defaults to line_start if omitted.

message.description: Concrete, actionable comment for the PR author.
